subcodes.first_line: O phoenix of the fire kindled in the Tree of Sinai! The tribulations of that blessed Being were boundless and infinite, and the afflictions of that noble Soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سمندر النار الموقده فی سدره السیناء مصائب آنحضرت بیحد و حصر و مشقات آنجناب
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
